scripts.lint: npm run lint:go && npm run lint:rust && npm run lint:js
scripts.lint:go: golangci-lint config verify && golangci-lint run --timeout=5m && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm golangci-lint run --timeout=5m
scripts.lint:rust: cargo clippy --manifest-path rewriter-rs/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path rewriter-rs/Cargo.toml --all --check
scripts.fmt:fix: golangci-lint fmt && cargo fmt --manifest-path rewriter-rs/Cargo.toml --all && biome format --write scripts test
